title: hetu-project/acl-aos-dispatcher
body_text:
# hetu-project/acl-aos-dispatcher

AOS Dispatcher is a Rust-based server application designed to handle TEE and OPML requests and responses within a decentralized AI infrastructure. It serves as a crucial component in the AOS (AI Operating System) ecosystem, leveraging EigenLayer for security and AVS for response verification.

Language: Rust
